title: Nova Arcana
description: [WIP] A magic mod that isn't afraid to go full send on special effects
body:
Nova Arcana seeks to be a magic mod rekindling the feeling of greats such as Thaumcraft while going a fundamentally different direction. Craft spells and use great staffs to cast them, all the while seeking to further your knowledge of the magical world, seeing just how deep the rabbit hole goes.

In this alpha, 6 spells are obtainable along with the modifier system, which further expands what each spell can do. 

DO NOT ADD THIS MOD TO YOUR MAIN WORLD YET, BUT PLEASE DO MAKE A TEST WORLD AND PLAY AROUND. FUTURE UPDATES ARE LIKELY TO BREAK SAVES DUE TO THE EXPERIMENTAL NATURE OF THE MOD
